---
title: context-as-argument
description: "Place context.Context first in parameter lists."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🔵 `note`

Place context.Context first in parameter lists. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func Load(id string, ctx context.Context) error
```

## Good

```go
func Load(ctx context.Context, id string) error
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only context-as-argument`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
